title: VOLUNTEER INTERFAITH CAREGIVERS - 211info
text: VOLUNTEER INTERFAITH CAREGIVERS OF CORVALLIS INC VOLUNTEER INTERFAITH CAREGIVERS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides assistance with shopping and non-emergency medical transportation. Also can assist in the design and building of wheelchair ramps, chair platforms, stairs, and handrails. Appointments must be made at least 3 days prior to service. 501 NW 25th Street Corvallis, OR 97330 Eligibility: Age 60 and older and adults with disabilities Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-6pm Email (541) 714-0820 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 714-0820 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for appointment FEES: Building supplies: Reimbursement for costs All other services: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Benton County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located near the city bus stop on the corner of Kings Boulevard and Taylor Street Services: Errand Running/Shopping Assistance * Adults With Disabilities/Health Conditions Errand Running/Shopping Assistance * Older Adults Home Barrier Evaluation/Removal Services * Adults With Disabilities/Health Conditions Home Barrier Evaluation/Removal Services * Older Adults Non-Emergency Medical Transportation * Adults With Disabilities/Health Conditions Non-Emergency Medical Transportation * Older Adults If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. VOLUNTEER INTERFAITH CAREGIVERS OF CORVALLIS INC
